creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 167123
log of: poudriere bulk -J4 -t -j 101amd64 mail/thunderbird-i18n

To reproduce, build with poudriere testport or poudriere bulk -t.

The failure showed up in:
poudriere bulk -J4 -t -j 101amd64 mail/thunderbird-i18n

===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/firefox
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/linux-firefox
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/linux-seamonkey
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/linux-thunderbird
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/seamonkey
Error: Orphaned: @dir %%XPI_LIBDIR%%/symlinks/thunderbird
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Full xz'ed build log attached.
